sections.label: Chorus
lines: A umte khempeuh ading Amah manpha,
A sangte khempeuh ading Amah manpha,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ama min thanna khuavakpi hong tang suk hi,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong paipihna peuh zui leng Amah’n hong paakta,
I lung sung nopna dim hi;
tengah tawntung khut in hong huai a,
I upna tawh i thei hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Kumpi inn sungah lungnop tawntungna munah
